judge_result.short_rationale: Core eye-rinse and escalation actions are present and usable, but contact lens timing is wrong versus the source, which requires removal after the first 5 minutes. It also adds unsupported details like saline, rotating the eye, neutralizing agents, and bringing the label. These additions are not clearly dangerous here, but they weaken source match.
